channel.title: Peter Farrar Books - Blog
channel.description: Photography techniques and leadership insights from Peter Farrar - author of The Complete Photography Field Guide and Leadership: The Culture Fix.

item.title: The Inclusive Manager
item.description: The Inclusive Manager gives every leader a practical playbook for real workplace situations, from neurodiversity to difficult conversations, with scripts, toolkits and a thirty day plan you can use straight away.

item.title: Visual Storytelling
item.description: Step beyond the technical mechanics of shutter speeds and gear checklists. Learn how shifting your focus to emotional resonance, lighting opportunities, and composition safety can revitalize your creative workflow and elevate your portfolio.

item.title: Alignment
item.description: They connect those tasks to a grander, meaningful purpose. When employees understand how their individual efforts contribute to the company ultimate vision

item.title: The Benefits of Slowing Down
item.description: Learn how slowing down and mastering camera fundamentals can boost creativity, confidence and consistency in photography.

item.title: The Consequences of a bad Manager
item.description: Learn the hidden consequences of leadership override, including lost trust, blurred accountability and reduced safety.

item.title: Building Faster, Smarter Systems
item.description: Automation means every post across my sites takes minutes, not hours, leaving time for photography and creative work.

item.title: Do You Really Need More Gear
item.description: Improve your photography skills by mastering your camera. Learn why understanding matters more than buying new gear.

item.title: What If a Manager Took Control of Your Team?
item.description: A manager takes control of your team. Learn what this means for leadership authority, accountability and workplace culture.

item.title: The Lens Sweet Spot - Beyond Just Sharpness
item.description: Why the Sweet Spot Is About Control, Not Perfection

item.title: The Leadership Chain
item.description: How Leadership Scales Through an Organisation

item.title: Pushing and Pulling Film, Beyond Exposure
item.description: Understanding How Push and Pull Techniques Redefine Film's Tonal Behaviour

item.title: Why Leadership Matters More Than Ever Now (Part 1)
item.description: Leadership in a World That Won't Slow Down

item.title: The Shadow Side of Success (Part 2)
item.description: Why What Difficult Behaviour Is Really Telling You

item.title: Mastering the Architecture of a Great Landscape (Part Two)
item.description: Refinement, Flow, and Bringing Cohesion to Life

item.title: Mastering the Architecture of a Great Landscape (Part One)
item.description: Foundations, Form, and the Principles That Shape Lasting Design

item.title: Good Managers vs Bad Managers
item.description: The Behaviours That Shape Every Workplace

item.title: From Top Performer to Top Leader
item.description: Why the skills that make you great at your job won't make you a great leader

item.title: ITIL 4 in Practice
item.description: What Companies Actually Do With ITIL 4

item.title: The Zone System Explained (Part One)
item.description: Understanding Ansel Adams' Zone System for Modern Photography

item.title: The Zone System Explained (Part Two)
item.description: Applying the Zone System in Modern Digital Photography
